title: RND Pipeline Task
description: Defines a single research run for the RND pipeline orchestrator.

topic.description: Full natural-language description of the research topic.

topic_slug.description: URL-safe slug. Lowercase, hyphens only. Used as the run directory name.

method_description.description: Optional rough description of the proposed method or model architecture. When provided, INNOVATION_DESIGNER will refine and stress-test this method instead of designing from scratch, and EXPERIMENT_ENGINEER will use it to guide implementation.

language.description: Output language for all agent artifacts.

year_range.description: Inclusive year range for literature retrieval, e.g. '2021-2026'.

deadline.description: Submission deadline in YYYY-MM-DD or free-text.

success_metric.description: Primary metric name and goal, e.g. 'AUROC >= 0.90 on holdout test set'.

min_delta.description: Minimum metric improvement to count as 'gain' in the iteration loop.

patience.description: Consecutive rounds without gain before early-stop triggers in experiment iteration loop.

revision_patience.description: Maximum rounds of revision iteration after initial paper review.

revision_convergence_threshold.description: If revision suggestions ratio drop below this fraction, consider converged and stop.

enable_revision_loop.description: Enable the revision feedback iteration loop (review → adjust → re-experiment → rewrite → review).

revision_score_threshold.description: Stop revision loop when paper overall score (0-100) meets or exceeds this threshold. REVIEWER_AGENT must output structured dimension scores in ## Paper Quality Scorecard section.

revision_patience_max_rounds.description: Maximum number of revision rounds (safeguard against endless loops if scoring is unreliable).

expectation_patience.description: Maximum rounds for the result expectation gate inner loop. If the best metric still does not meet success_metric after this many rounds, proceed to writing with an [EXPECTATION UNMET] marker.

truthfulness_patience.description: Maximum rounds for truthfulness verification. If paper claims still have mismatches after this many rounds, proceed to review with the truthfulness report attached.

baseline_repositories.description: GitHub URLs or 'default'. Passed to CODE_SCOUT.

commands.description: Shell commands to run during the experiment phase.

setup.description: Package setup commands run once before experiments. Reuse the current Python environment by default; do not create new conda/venv environments unless explicitly requested.

experiment.description: Experiment commands executed with retry logic.

evalMetric.description: Command that prints a single numeric metric to stdout. Used for metric parsing.

iteration.description: Configuration for ITERATIVE_RND mode. When present, the pipeline operates on an existing run directory instead of starting from scratch.

mode.description: Iteration mode: audit (gap analysis), experiment (fill gaps), paper (update draft), review (re-review), revision (full revision cycle), full (all of the above).

run_dir.description: Path to existing run directory. If omitted, auto-resolves latest run for topic_slug.

experiment_gaps.description: Specific experiment gaps to fill, e.g. ['CausalICL cross-graph D1-D9', 'statsOnly BN datasets'].

skip_phases.description: Phases to skip in full mode, e.g. ['review'] to skip re-review.
